events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the missing expansion tank on a closed system is a **fail** (high risk) — it violates IRC P2804.6 / IPC 504.7, leaves the T&P valve as the only pressure relief for thermal expansion (leading to premature valve failure/weeping and tank over-pressurization), and requires installing a properly sized, pre-charged expansion tank before inspection sign-off.
